    Baptiste Gregorutti

    Head of Data Science at SCAI – Sorbonne Center for AI. Research engineer, educator, and team lead.

    • Paris, France
    • SCAI – Sorbonne Université
    • Email
    • GitHub
    • LinkedIn

    Teaching & Education

    Teaching has been a consistent thread throughout my career — from university courses in statistics and Python to AI literacy workshops for non-technical audiences.

    Key figures (2023–2026)

     PersonalTeam (SCAI)
    Training hours230+400+
    Students300+700+
    Courses10+40+

    Introduction to AI for Non-Technical Audiences

    Workshop – Bachelor's / Master's / Continuing education, , 2023

    A flagship course developed for students in humanities, medicine, and other non-quantitative fields. One of the most requested courses in the SCAI Education portfolio.

    Python for Data Analysis — Continuing Education

    Workshop – Continuing education, , 2022

    Practical hands-on workshops for researchers and professionals with little or no prior coding experience. Part of the SCAI Education platform.

    Python & Data Science — Bachelor’s/Master’s level (UFR)

    Course – Bachelor's / Master's degree, , 2022

    12 hours · UFR Ingénierie Mathématique, parcours Ingénierie Mathématique · Bachelor’s / Master’s level

    Python & Data Science — Master’s level (ISUP)

    Course – Master's degree, , 2022

    30 hours · ISUP, parcours Ingénierie Statistique et Data Science · Master’s level · Jan 2022 – present
